profile.name: Vaidik Pipaliya
profile.headline: AI Developer & MCA Student
about: I am an MCA student and aspiring software engineer passionate about Machine Learning, Natural Language Processing, and Data Analytics.
I focus on building real-world projects such as reservation systems and ML-based detection apps using Python, Flask, and JavaScript.

research.narrative: My exploration centers on applying machine learning algorithms to practical problems, from natural language classification (hate speech detection) to agricultural computer vision diagnostics.

focus.name: Machine Learning
focus.description: Building and fine-tuning models for classification, NLP, and predictive analytics.

focus.name: Web Development
focus.description: Creating backend systems and dynamic user interfaces using Flask, Django, and JavaScript.

focus.name: Data Analytics
focus.description: Extracting insights from complex datasets and visualizing patterns for decision making.

projects.name: RestFast
projects.summary: A dining reservation platform built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, featuring table booking and a 2-hour limit live countdown.

projects.name: CyberGuard
projects.summary: Detects abusive and harmful cyberbullying content on social platforms using Python, Flask, and Machine Learning.

projects.name: Krishi Rakshak
projects.summary: A farming assistant that detects crop and plant diseases from uploaded images using Python, Flask, and ML/CNNs.

footer: Striving to build intelligent, practical software solutions.
